notes: v250 — Every signal is now filterable. The Refine filters panel's signal group (now called 'Signal Flags') gains a checkbox for each of the new flags — 🚀 Breakout, 📉 Distribution, 🥇 Volume record, ⤴ MA cross — plus 🧑‍💼 Director filing ✓ (confirmed, last 5 days), all working with Match Any / Match All. 'Possible accumulation' is relabelled 'Informed buying' to match its tag. The Announcements (5-day) section — previously just an information note with out-of-date text — now explains the confirmed ✓ layer properly and adds a real filter: show only shares with confirmed price-sensitive news, or only confirmed-quiet ones (fills in progressively as the official feed checks the shares on screen). Tip: tick ⤴ MA cross on the full market to see today's golden crosses — the flag only ever shows on the exact day a cross happens, so expect a handful per day, not hundreds.
